description: Sophia opens a new tab in the Chrome browser.
frame_description: A new blank tab is opened in the browser.

description: The Google search homepage loads in the new tab.
frame_description: The Google search page with shortcuts is visible.

description: Sophia types 'hostel' into the browser address bar.
frame_description: Text is being entered into the browser's address/search bar.

description: Autocomplete search suggestions appear below the address bar.
frame_description: A dropdown list of search suggestions appears as the user types.

description: Sophia selects 'hostel world' from the search suggestions.
frame_description: The user clicks on a specific search suggestion from the dropdown.

description: The browser navigates to the Google search results page for 'hostel world'.

description: The cursor hovers over the main Hostelworld website link in the search results.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over the first organic search result.

description: Sophia clicks on the Hostelworld website link.
frame_description: The user activates the link to the Hostelworld website.

description: The Hostelworld homepage loads.
frame_description: The Hostelworld landing page is fully rendered.

description: Sophia clicks into the destination search box.
interaction_target: Where do you want to go? input
frame_description: The user focuses the search input field.

description: A location suggestion dropdown appears.
frame_description: A dropdown menu with 'Current Location' appears below the search box.

description: Sophia types 'london' into the search box.
frame_description: The user enters the destination name.

description: Location suggestions for 'london' appear.
frame_description: The dropdown updates with specific city suggestions.

description: Sophia selects 'London, England' from the suggestions.
frame_description: The user chooses the first suggestion in the list.

description: The search box updates to show the selected destination.
frame_description: The input field now contains 'London, England'.

description: Sophia clicks on the date selection field.
frame_description: The user clicks to open the calendar.

description: The calendar date picker modal opens.
frame_description: A calendar overlay appears on the screen.

description: Sophia clicks the next month arrow in the calendar.
frame_description: The user navigates forward in the calendar.

description: The calendar updates to show March and April 2026.
frame_description: The calendar view shifts to the next two months.

description: Sophia clicks the next month arrow again.
frame_description: The user continues navigating forward in time.

description: The calendar updates to show April and May 2026.
frame_description: The calendar view shifts forward again.

description: Sophia clicks the next month arrow again.
frame_description: The user clicks the arrow button.

description: The calendar updates to show June and July 2026.
frame_description: The calendar view shifts forward.

description: Sophia clicks the next month arrow again.
frame_description: The user clicks the arrow button.

description: The calendar updates to show July and August 2026.
frame_description: The calendar view shifts forward.

description: Sophia clicks the next month arrow again.
frame_description: The user clicks the arrow button.

description: The calendar updates to show August and September 2026.
frame_description: The calendar view shifts forward.

description: Sophia clicks the next month arrow again.
frame_description: The user clicks the arrow button.

description: The calendar updates to show October and November 2026.
frame_description: The calendar view shifts forward.

description: Sophia hovers over October 22 in the calendar.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over a specific date.

description: Sophia hovers over October 27 in the calendar.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over another date.

description: Sophia selects November 9 as the check-in date.
frame_description: The user clicks on the date November 9.

description: Sophia hovers over November 12.
frame_description: The cursor moves over November 12.

description: Sophia selects November 15 as the check-out date.
frame_description: The user clicks on the date November 15.

description: The calendar date picker closes.
frame_description: The calendar overlay disappears.

description: Sophia clicks the 'Let's go!' search button.
frame_description: The user initiates the search.

description: The search results page for London hostels loads.
page_title: Hostels in London - Book London Hostels Online at Hostelworld.com
frame_description: The browser navigates to the results page.

description: A skeleton loading screen appears while results are fetched.
frame_description: Placeholder elements are visible while content loads.

description: Sophia hovers over the save (heart) icon on the first hostel result.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over a heart icon on a property card.

description: Sophia scrolls down through the list of London hostels.
frame_description: The user scrolls vertically through the search results.

description: Sophia clicks the 'Map' button to switch to map view.
frame_description: The user clicks the map toggle in the top right.

description: The map view loads with price pins.
frame_description: The list view is replaced by an interactive map.

description: Sophia drags the map to explore different areas of London.
frame_description: The user pans the map to the left.

description: Sophia hovers over a price pin ($109.97) on the map.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over a map marker.

description: Sophia hovers over another price pin ($82.89).
frame_description: The cursor moves to another map marker.

description: Sophia hovers over a third price pin ($64.52).
frame_description: The cursor moves to a third map marker.

description: Sophia clicks the 'List' button to return to the list view.
frame_description: The user clicks the toggle to exit map view.

description: The list view of hostels is restored.
frame_description: The map is replaced by the property list.

description: Sophia scrolls down further through the hostel results.
frame_description: The user continues browsing the list of hostels.
